## Overview

This repository automates content generation for system design documentation based on collected data.

## Key Features

- **Automated Content Generation**: Generates system design content automatically based on input data / collected data
- **Daily Scheduling**: Produces and distributes content on a daily schedule
- **Email Distribution**: Automatically sends generated content via email using SMTP and Nodemailer
- **AI-Powered Processing**: Leverages LangChain for agentic AI workflows
- **Cloud Integration**: Utilizes AWS Bedrock for advanced AI capabilities

## Tech Stack

- **Email Service**: Nodemailer with SMTP
- **AI Framework**: LangChain
- **Cloud Services**: AWS Bedrock
